position_sizing._max_total_exposure_pct_note: unused — do not rely on this field. Only consumed by portfolio_intelligence.compute_dynamic_sizes() for prompt display; not enforced by risk_kernel or order_executor.

parameters._max_position_pct_capacity_note: Enforced by risk_kernel.size_position() as single-name cap upper bound. Denominator is exposure_dollars + buying_power (total_capacity), not equity. Changed from max_position_pct_equity=0.25 (equity-based) in Sprint 10 aggressiveness pass.
parameters.vector_memory_status: disabled — restore before confidence calibration is meaningful
parameters._add_conviction_gate_note: S7-H: minimum conviction required to ADD to an existing position. BUY on already-held symbol rejected below this threshold.
parameters._max_deploy_pct_of_bp_note: A1 prompt guidance only — no hard gate. Ceiling: prefer new entries when total_market_value < buying_power * 0.90 and regime supports it.

director_notes.active_context:
MEMO 2026-04-20: The system remains in a non-operational, halted state for the fourth consecutive review cycle. Governance signals confirm 19 halt verdicts, 0 reconcile-only cycles, 0 closed trades, and an unknown_session_label_pct of 1.0 — meaning no decision is successfully completing the preflight pipeline. The A1 divergence halt, which has been firing continuously for a minimum of 10 hours per the Execution Engineer and Risk Manager reports, has not been manually cleared and no escalation pathway exists after repeated halt cycles. This is a P0 infrastructure failure and the only priority that matters this week.

Three parameter changes are applied this cycle, all with strong multi-analyst evidence bases. First, stop_loss_pct_core is reduced from 3.5% to 3.0% to eliminate the compliance violation that has been causing systematic order rejections — the Compliance Auditor documented 6 explicit rejection events where stops exceeded the 3.0% enforcement ceiling, creating an internal contradiction between the config value and the enforcement rule. Second, max_overnight_position_pct_equity is re-asserted at 0.04 (down from 0.07) for the third consecutive cycle — this directed value has not been confirmed deployed, and if it is not deployed this cycle, the config write pipeline itself must be audited as a governance failure. Third, max_crypto_exposure_pct is re-asserted at 0.07 (down from 0.10) for the second consecutive cycle, aligning crypto exposure with the general single-name ceiling while sector tagging remains non-functional. The sector_rotation_bias is rolled to neutral as its expiry date (2026-04-22) passes within this memo window and no live performance data supports the prior commodities overweight thesis.

All signal weights and the recalibration gate remain frozen at n=30. With 0 closed trades post-BUG-003 correction, any signal weight change would be entirely arbitrary. The Market Intelligence Researcher's findings on multi-agent LLM frameworks and RL-fine-tuned models are architecturally interesting and filed as medium-term roadmap items — they are not actionable while the system cannot execute a single trade. The CFO's identification of 0% prompt cache utilization (representing a 40-60% potential API cost reduction) is a genuine structural waste issue, but at $4.45/week total spend it is a P2 item behind P0 halt resolution and P1 escalation pathway implementation.

The pattern of directed config values not being deployed (max_overnight_position_pct_equity for three cycles, max_crypto_exposure_pct for two cycles) is itself a governance concern independent of the halt. If the config write pipeline cannot reliably apply directed changes, the strategy director's output has no operational effect and the review process is performative. Next cycle's memo will require explicit confirmation that these values are live in the deployed config before any further parameter adjustments are considered.

exit_management._protection_grace_seconds_note: Alpaca paper propagation buffer — bracket stop children take 1-3s to appear in GET /orders after a fill; 120s = two full market cycles before protection_missing fires
exit_management._trail_tiers_note: Graduated trail. gain_pct = price gain threshold from entry. stop_pct = stop target as % above entry. Highest qualifying tier applies. Never narrows existing stop.

account2.cycle_offset_note: Account 2 runs 90s after Account 1 each market cycle to consume fresh signal scores

shadow_lane.note: Shadow lane logs decisions only — zero execution side effects

a2_router.v1_defaults_note: These are v1 safety defaults added 2026-04-20. Each is a candidate for tuning after shadow validation.

a2_veto_thresholds._tuned: 2026-04-21 — widened max_bid_ask_spread_pct from 0.05 to 0.15 after observing GS (9.1%), TSM (11.8%), AMZN (5.6%) vetoed every cycle; OI/theta/DTE/EV thresholds held at v1 values (not over-firing). 2026-04-21 — added max_loss_pct=0.05 (raised from hardcoded 0.03): V4 was hardcoded and not config-driven unlike all other rules. options_intelligence.py sizes contracts to equity*0.05 budget cap, so V4 at 0.03 created an internal contradiction where the sizer built candidates that V4 always vetoed for high-priced stocks (TSM $367: max_loss=4740 > 0.03*100K=3000). Setting max_loss_pct to match the budget cap (0.05) resolves the contradiction without loosening absolute position size control — contract count is still bounded by the budget.

portfolio_allocator._note: S6-ALLOCATOR: shadow mode only. enable_live must remain false until trim-only promotion sprint. trim_severity added S7-I. size_trim added S8.
